subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-03-27
subcodes.first_line: The spiritual food is prepared. Blessed are those who eat therefrom... if you can concoct such delicious dishes with vegetables and nuts I can assure you many people will join your crusade against slaughtering animals and eating their flesh.
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @material and spiritual existence; two books
